KAMEL Nadjet
KAMEL Nadjet
Grade:Professeur
Grade:Professeur
Email:nkamel@univ-setif.dz

Département:Informatique
Bureau:
Bureau:

Nadjet KAMEL is a full professor at the department of computer science of the Université Ferhat Abbes Setif 1 (UFAS1), Algeria, since 2011. She received her Magister and Phd degrees in Computer Science from the Université des Sciences et Technologies Houari Boumedien (USTHB), Algeria, respectively in 1995 and 2007. She has been a Postdoctoral
Researcher at the University of Moncton, in Canada from August 2007 to August 2009
and a Lecturer at the USTHB from 1995 to 2007.
From 2009 to 2011 she was an associate
professor at the same university. She has been involved in many research projects (PNR, CNEPRU, CMEP TAssili). Since 2011, she is the head of the team research "Data Mining and Machine
Learning" at the Laboratory of Research in Artificial Intelligence (LRIA) at USTHB. From
2014 to 2015, she was the Director of the department of computer science of UFAS1.
Since 2015 she is a Vice-Rector of  UFAS1. Her main research
interests are related to Artificial intelligence and Data Mining. She
served as program committee member, organization committee member and chair of many
international conferences.
